required_preferences.fact: Eats homemade lunches at his desk during recovery — avoids walking to the break room due to mobility restrictions

supersedes.fact: Brings homemade lunches to work but never eats at his desk — always moves to the break room to eat

required_preferences.fact: Suspends all mentorship and upskilling activities for junior admin; devotes all available work hours to IRS audit preparation until completion

supersedes.fact: No longer schedules weekly accounting training sessions with staff — focused solely on own workload during peak audit preparation

required_preferences.fact: Checks emails only at 10am and 4pm — avoids notifications outside those windows
Checks blood pressure every morning before breakfast — never skips even when rushed
Hosts monthly board game nights for his college friends at his home; never chooses a venue outside the house
Reviews all accounting entries at the end of each day — never leaves reconciliation tasks for later

persona: A senior accountant at a nonprofit organization with limited staff
